objective: Create a governed acquisition router for the MARKET total-return source required by V3.53 without promoting price-only data.
forbidden: Do not accept price-only index close as total-return source.
Do not accept strategy NAV, benchmark NAV, or backtest-derived files.
Do not print or write real credentials, tokens, passwords, or cookies.
Do not run V3.53 labels or V3.49 validation in this version.
Do not run portfolio backtests or model promotion.
acceptance: Provider readiness must be reported without secrets.
CSIndex total-return candidates must be discovered from explicit total-return keywords.
Every acquisition route must have a ready/blocker status and acceptance note.
If no certified source is acquired, the target source must remain missing and validation blocked.
Manual instructions must tell the user exactly what CSV contract unblocks V3.53.
